args.Description: "Declarando o estado isFilterSidebarOpen para controlar a abertura da barra lateral de filtros."
args.TargetContent: "  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('Dashboard');\n  const [isSidebarExpanded, setIsSidebarExpanded] = useState(false);\n  const [isMobileSidebarOpen, setIsMobileSidebarOpen] = useState(false);"
